name: branchforge
description: Durable branching deliberation with native agents and deterministic tools

interface.shortDescription: Explore competing branches with durable evidence.
interface.longDescription: BranchForge coordinates native subagents while deterministic MCP tools preserve branch lineage, claims, evidence, findings, artifacts, dossiers, and committed decisions.
defaultPrompt: Investigate this problem with durable branches.
Build this product through research and software branches.
